headline: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
summary: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) concluded the recent trading session at $182.62, signifying a +1.36% move from its prior day's close.

headline: WILLIAMS SONOMA LAUNCHES COLLABORATION WITH OAKVILLE GROCERY
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 06, 2026--Williams Sonoma Launches New Collaboration with the Famous Napa Valley Food and Wine Store, Oakville Grocery.
